name: button-unfilled
title: ButtonUnfilled
description: Unfilled button with variant (label / icon / icon-label), control-density sizes, width hug/fill, active/border/dot, and surface-aware interaction states.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by ButtonUnfilled. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.
Used internally by ButtonUnfilled. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

variant.description: Content layout. Icon-only chrome must pass variant="icon".

width.description: Width fit — hug content or fill the parent.

label.description: Visible text for label / icon-label variants.

icon.description: Canonical IcoMo icon export name for icon / icon-label variants.

isActive.description: Active/selected state. Always promotes icon/label to primary foreground.

activeFill.description: When active, render selected interaction fill. Set false for shell chrome (primary fg, no fill).

hasBorder.description: Secondary 1px inset border. Default on; shell chrome should pass false.

backgroundContrast.description: Parent surface contrast for interaction and focus tokens.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name (required for icon-only when label is empty).
